_purpose: Tracks the current visual/physical state of each character across episodes. The image generator reads this before every scene to ensure wounds, scars, aging, and equipment changes appear correctly and consistently.
_update_rule: Updated automatically by the pipeline after each episode using character_visual_state_updates from the episode JSON. Never manually edited — always managed by the pipeline.

permanent_changes: small scar above left eyebrow — pre-story, always present

example.description: deep gash on left forearm, hastily bandaged with torn cloth, still bleeding
example.prompt_tag: deep wound on left forearm wrapped in torn cloth bandage

example.description: now carries a Guild-issue resonance dampener on belt
example.prompt_tag: resonance dampener device clipped to belt
